docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LEVINE. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING ON RECORD. (506)
